mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, flow_id, version_no, trigger_type, status, started_at, finished_at, elapsed_ms, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by
mapper.select:
select
distinct
,
from hb_flow_run
order by ${orderByClause}

select
distinct
from hb_flow_run
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into hb_flow_run (id, tenant_id, flow_id, version_no, trigger_type, status, started_at, finished_at, elapsed_ms, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, input_summary, output_summary, error_message) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{flowId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{versionNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{triggerType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{startedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{finishedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{elapsedMs,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inputSummary,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{outputSummary,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{errorMessage,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR})

insert into hb_flow_run
id,
tenant_id,
flow_id,
version_no,
trigger_type,
status,
started_at,
finished_at,
elapsed_ms,
create_time,
update_time,
create_by,
update_by,
input_summary,
output_summary,
error_message,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{flowId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{versionNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{triggerType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{startedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{finishedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{elapsedMs,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{inputSummary,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
#{outputSummary,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
#{errorMessage,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update hb_flow_run
id = #{row.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
tenant_id = #{row.tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
flow_id = #{row.flowId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
version_no = #{row.versionNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
trigger_type = #{row.triggerType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{row.status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
started_at = #{row.startedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
finished_at = #{row.finishedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
elapsed_ms = #{row.elapsedMs,jdbcType=BIGINT},
create_time = #{row.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{row.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_by = #{row.createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_by = #{row.updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
input_summary = #{row.inputSummary,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
output_summary = #{row.outputSummary,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
error_message = #{row.errorMessage,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},

update hb_flow_run set id = #{row.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, tenant_id = #{row.tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, flow_id = #{row.flowId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, version_no = #{row.versionNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, trigger_type = #{row.triggerType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{row.status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, started_at = #{row.startedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, finished_at = #{row.finishedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, elapsed_ms = #{row.elapsedMs,jdbcType=BIGINT}, create_time = #{row.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{row.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_by = #{row.createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_by = #{row.updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, input_summary = #{row.inputSummary,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, output_summary = #{row.outputSummary,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, error_message = #{row.errorMessage,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}

update hb_flow_run set id = #{row.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, tenant_id = #{row.tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, flow_id = #{row.flowId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, version_no = #{row.versionNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, trigger_type = #{row.triggerType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{row.status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, started_at = #{row.startedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, finished_at = #{row.finishedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, elapsed_ms = #{row.elapsedMs,jdbcType=BIGINT}, create_time = #{row.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{row.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_by = #{row.createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_by = #{row.updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update hb_flow_run
tenant_id = #{tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
flow_id = #{flowId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
version_no = #{versionNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
trigger_type = #{triggerType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
started_at = #{startedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
finished_at = #{finishedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
elapsed_ms = #{elapsedMs,jdbcType=BIGINT},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
input_summary = #{inputSummary,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
output_summary = #{outputSummary,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
error_message = #{errorMessage,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update hb_flow_run set tenant_id = #{tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, flow_id = #{flowId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, version_no = #{versionNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, trigger_type = #{triggerType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, started_at = #{startedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, finished_at = #{finishedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, elapsed_ms = #{elapsedMs,jdbcType=BIGINT}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, input_summary = #{inputSummary,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, output_summary = #{outputSummary,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, error_message = #{errorMessage,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update hb_flow_run set tenant_id = #{tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, flow_id = #{flowId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, version_no = #{versionNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, trigger_type = #{triggerType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, started_at = #{startedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, finished_at = #{finishedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, elapsed_ms = #{elapsedMs,jdbcType=BIGINT}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
